name: obsidian
description: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

interface.shortDescription: Obsidian vault editing skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Obsidian bundles skills for creating and editing Obsidian Flavored Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas files, vault-oriented CLI workflows, web-page-to-markdown extraction, and knowledge refactoring.
defaultPrompt: Create an Obsidian note with proper properties and wikilinks.
Refactor these notes into a maintainable Obsidian knowledge structure.
Create a JSON Canvas map for this topic.
